title: crash_info.c missing from CMakeLists.txt causes link failure
description:
The file subsys/lichen/crash_info.c exists and is referenced by lora_l2.c and main.c, but is not included in target_sources() in CMakeLists.txt. This causes link failures:

```
undefined reference to 'crash_info_check_and_clear'
undefined reference to 'crash_info_store'
```

Fix: Add crash_info.c to the target_sources() list in firmware/bridge-zephyr/CMakeLists.txt
close_reason: Completed: crash_info.c is included in firmware/bridge-zephyr/CMakeLists.txt app target sources and nrf52840dk Zephyr build links successfully.
